title: Fishing Rod 3D
body:
![-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e3aa846716696b60dbb01897aaac4bcead7c20f.png)

You wanted to complement the fishing, now you can do it with my resource pack that will make a cool 3d fishing rod out of a boring rod

This resource pack changes the vanilla fishing rod for 3D  !!

What other support for mods you would like to offer can be in the [comments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fishing-rod-3d/comments)

# **Newer versions can be found** [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fishing-rod-3d)

       

![-coming soon-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a9a24762855db43ab08c4bd436bb560e4df72fe.png)

And more mods 

![-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e3aa846716696b60dbb01897aaac4bcead7c20f.png)

Support mod:
- [Alex Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Aquaculture 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture)
